3299500.name: Squire Road: The Quest for the Black Knight
3299500.description: Squire Road is a 3D Side-Scrolling Action Adventure which uses mouse and keyboard to aim and interact and do combat with elements in the foreground and deep in the background. You will take control of the Black Knight, who has been summoned into an unfamiliar world where peril awaits around every corner. Along your journey, you will meet the squire, a young boy who has lost his sister. Through dialog and interactions, you will help the boy solve the mystery of his missing sister as you edge your way closer to discovering a much more menacing situation happening throughout the lands.
3299500.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
